base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of e_honda — a character from 1991 street fighter ii. E. Honda — Hundred Hand Slap + Sumo Headbutt. Note: asset 27199 is Honda's Stage, Honda-character may be bundled or absent. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
